summary: Opus 3-tier catalyst sweep (chunk 17 (SLDB-TCMD)): scan -> deep -> skeptic

survivors_flagged.one_line: REGAL Phase 3 AML (galinpepimut-S) final OS analysis triggers at 80th event - 78 events as of 5/11/26, data lock imminent; real dated binary though ~+50% already re-rated.
Ivonescimab: dated forward binaries - HARMONi-3 interim PFS Q2-2026 and Nov-2026 NSCLC PDUFA; large-cap so asymmetry debatable but catalysts are real and dated.

NuScale; Romania RoPower mid-2026 go/no-go would be first full commercial SMR plant - one real dated milestone, but largely a nuclear/AI narrative re-rate (Amazon/TVA already in), thin structural edge.

Live: ~$900M short-term loan refi due THIS MONTH (Jun 2026) via JPM after federal distress-financing denied; state-vs-federal litigation (appeal ruling pending) + 50kbbl/d ramp. Federal restart fired but financing/legal asymmetry mispriced.
Codelco lithium JV cleared last antitrust gate (China Nov-2025); set to close before Boric exits early-2026, pending only Chile comptroller. Dated structural transformation of the underlying.

Post-Elevidys-crisis restructuring (36% RIF, notes refi'd to 2030); sirolimus immunosuppression protocol to be submitted to FDA as pathway to re-establish non-ambulant dosing. Real dated regulatory milestone but timing soft.
Apitegromab SMA BLA resubmitted; hard PDUFA end-Sep-2026, plus EMA decision mid-2026 and Embraze obesity Ph2 (lean-mass) optionality. Multiple dated catalysts.
$1.5B all-cash sale of Copler stake to Cengiz Holding; closing expected Q3-2026, pending Turkish mining regulator. Clean dated monetization clearing the suspended-mine overhang.
Board-approved externalization to Neostellar (Magnetar JV) with $20M Magnetar investment, subject to stockholder vote; structural re-rating vs wide NAV discount (NAV $14.24). Timing not pinned.
Shutterstock/Getty MoE: DOJ cleared unconditionally Feb-2026; only UK CMA editorial remedy left with final decision due ~Apr-19-2026. Tight dated arb on a single remaining gate.
Hard merger-arb: Prosperity buys Stellar for $11.36 cash + 0.3803 PB shares; ALL regulatory approvals received, shareholder vote May 27, expected close ~July 1 2026.
Pivotal Ph3 EMPEROR (zorevunersen/Dravet, w/ Biogen) enrollment completes Q2'26, but value-inflection readout mid-2027 + rolling NDA H1'27 = too far for ACTIVE; BTD asymmetry.

UK Park Holidays sale to Aermont (£768M/$1.03B) announced May-2026, targeted 2H-2026 close pending FCA approval; portfolio simplification + prior special-div pattern, but proceeds use uncommitted and $1.0-1.1B non-cash impairment is a headwind.

Complicated merger: buying 51% of Netherlands tissue JV w/ Kimberly-Clark ($3.4B EV, $1.73B cash); EU unconditional approval May-10, all antitrust cleared, expected Q3-2026 close gated on K-C reorg; call option on remaining 49% = structural hardening. Own the underlying.

Dated binary: MOLBREEVI (molgramostim) aPAP BLA, PDUFA Nov-22-2026 (extended from Aug); first-in-class orphan, priority review, FDA cited no safety/efficacy/CMC concerns — mispriced asymmetry on a sub-$6 microcap.
Definitive all-cash takeout by UHS at $5.25; shareholders approved May 29 2026, close targeted Q3-26 pending state regulatory approvals — clean dated merger-arb, tight residual spread.
Beetaloo Shenandoah-South FID taken; first gas sales dated Q3-2026 into an east-coast gas crunch — real dated operational/supply-timing milestone, but single-asset binary + funding risk.
Definitive all-cash acquisition by IKS Health at $26.25; board-approved, 27% voting support locked, close expected Q3-2026 — clean dated merger-arb.

verified.catalyst: SELLAS' pivotal Phase 3 REGAL trial of galinpepimut-S (GPS) in CR2 AML hits its 80th-event final overall-survival trigger, forcing database lock, unblinding, and topline OS readout — a binary win/fail efficacy event.
verified.dated_milestone: 78/80 OS events confirmed by CRO as of 2026-05-11; 80th event (database-lock trigger) imminent with topline "within weeks" of trigger — expected ~June/Q3 2026.
verified.instrument: Equity (SLS common); the binary skew suits a defined-risk long-call/long-straddle given an event-driven readout date and elevated IV.
verified.bloom_gates: G3 — a specific currently-unpriced figure: the still-blinded final OS hazard ratio / median OS is the concrete unknown, gated on a precise, company-confirmed 80-event count (78/80 as of 5/11/26).
verified.edge: M — genuinely unfired binary OS readout that is imminent and idiosyncratic (cash $107M+ covers it), but ~+50% has already re-rated the stock ($8.23 vs $1.39 52w-low, ~2x the 50d avg), compressing upside asymmetry while leaving a large downside leg on a fail.
verified.primary_source: SELLAS Life Sciences Q1 2026 results / corporate update press release, GlobeNewsWire & SEC 8-K Exhibit 99.1, 2026-05-12 ("78 Events have Occurred… as of May 11, 2026… Final Analysis… following the 80th Event").
verified.kill_fact: PRIMARY SOURCE CONFIRMS THE BINARY, CORRECTS THE TIMELINE. SELLAS' Q1-2026 release (GlobeNewsWire, 2026-05-12; IR-mirrored) states verbatim: "78 Events have Occurred in the Trial as of May 11, 2026; SELLAS Remains Blinded to Trial Outcomes" and "Final Analysis of REGAL Trial of GPS in AML to be Conducted Following the 80th Event." So the REGAL CR2-AML OS binary is real, dated, single-name (not macro), and as of early June 2026 still FORWARD/UNFIRED (80th event not yet reached; efficacy blinded) -> the FIRED-not-forward attack fails, holds ACTIVE. Live quote confirms triage figures: $8.23 (today -8.96%), yearLow $1.39, priceAvg200 $3.57, mktcap ~$1.17B. CORRECTION: the line's claim that "management says topline arrives within weeks of that trigger" is NOT supported by the primary source -- the 05-12 release gives no weeks-level timeline, only the customary "database lock... unblinding... disclosure of topline results" sequence, and the prior 12-29-2025 release explicitly cautions "the timing of studies with overall survival as an endpoint can vary." So the timing is event-driven and indeterminate, not "weeks." HIDDEN OVERHANG: a separate pending arbitration ruling on a GPS China-payment dispute is an undisclosed binary risk not noted in the line. Edge is genuinely Medium not High: stock has already run ~+50%+ off lows (priced optimism), and a ~12.6 vs 8.0-month OS bar makes the win/fail genuinely uncertain. Tradeable as a defined-risk long-call/long-straddle into elevated IV. Net: core binary CONFIRMED; "within weeks" timeline magnitude REFUTED -> CONFIRMED_WITH_CORRECTIONS, score 6.
verified.analysis: Verified from the primary source: SELLAS' Q1-2026 release (2026-05-12 GlobeNewsWire / SEC 8-K) states the CRO confirmed 78 of the pre-specified 80 OS events as of 2026-05-11, with final analysis to follow the 80th event — exactly matching the triage flag, and management says topline arrives within weeks of that trigger. The efficacy data is still blinded and undisclosed, so the binary itself is forward and unfired, but the stock has already run ~+50% (now $8.23 vs a $3.57 200-day avg and $1.39 low), so much of the optimism is priced and edge is Medium not High. It is a clean, dated, single-name clinical binary (not macro), so it holds ACTIVE/6: real and imminent, but the asymmetry is partly spent on the upside.

verified.catalyst: Ivonescimab FDA PDUFA decision (Nov 14, 2026) for EGFRm post-TKI non-squamous NSCLC plus the final HARMONi-3 squamous PFS readout in 2H-2026.
verified.dated_milestone: PDUFA action date Nov 14, 2026 (next hard date); final HARMONi-3 squamous PFS 2H-2026; non-squamous cohort PFS 1H-2027.
verified.instrument: equity / long-dated calls around Nov-2026 PDUFA
verified.bloom_gates: G2 (concrete dated FDA PDUFA commitment, Nov 14 2026); G1 weak (PDUFA milestone is regulatory, not a counterparty deal)
verified.edge: L - $11.5B large-cap (asymmetry weak per triage); the headline de-risking binary (HARMONi-3 squamous INTERIM PFS) already FIRED NEGATIVELY on Apr 30 2026 (missed significance, shares tumbled), so the triage's "forward Q2-2026 interim" framing is stale; ivonescimab is heavily covered and stock already de-rated (-52% from 52wk high, below 50/200DMA).
verified.primary_source: Summit Q1-2026 results / press release & allsci coverage (Apr 30, 2026): HARMONi-3 squamous interim PFS missed threshold, final PFS 2H-2026; FDA BLA acceptance PR (Jan 29, 2026) setting PDUFA Nov 14, 2026.
verified.analysis: The triage's central premise — a forward Q2-2026 HARMONi-3 interim PFS binary — is factually fired: the squamous-cohort interim was reported Apr 30, 2026 and MISSED the predefined statistical-significance threshold (IDMC continued the study; shares tumbled), so it is no longer an unpriced forward edge. Genuinely forward dated catalysts do remain — the Nov 14, 2026 ivonescimab PDUFA (BLA accepted Jan 29, 2026 on HARMONi data) and the final HARMONi-3 squamous PFS in 2H-2026 — which clear the dated/forward bar (G2). But edge is low: an $11.5B large-cap dilutes asymmetry, the marquee de-risking event already resolved negatively, and a known/well-covered late-stage name with an already-de-rated stock argues for WATCH, not ACTIVE.

verified.catalyst: NuScale's awaited first firm commercial SMR customer order (data-center/utility/South Korea) remains unsigned, while the Romania RoPower milestone the triage cited as the forward go/no-go has already fired.
verified.dated_milestone: Romania RoPower FID already APPROVED Feb 12, 2026 (fired); remaining "firm first customer order" is undated and already slipped its prior end-2025 guide — next checkpoint is Q2 2026 earnings (~Aug 2026), no committed date.
verified.bloom_gates: none — G1 fails (no named counterparty; South Korea/Doosan only "might be interested," not a firm sale), G2 fails (no signed order, zero committed MW/$), G3 fails (no specific unpriced figure)
verified.edge: L — pure nuclear/AI narrative re-rate; the only DATED+named milestone (Romania FID) fired Feb 2026, and the pending first-order is unspecific and has already missed its own deadline, so no structural informational edge over consensus.
verified.primary_source: World Nuclear News / Neutron Bytes / PowerMag — Romania RoPower six-NuScale-SMR FID approved Feb 12-13, 2026; Motley Fool 2026-06-04 "still lacks a firm sale" + FMP Q1 2026 results; FMP quote 2026-06-05 ($10.50, -12.5%).
verified.analysis: The triage premise is stale: Romania's RoPower six-module FID was approved Feb 12, 2026, so the "mid-2026 go/no-go" is no longer forward. The genuinely forward item — NuScale's first firm commercial order — has no named counterparty, no committed MW/$ figure, and already blew past its end-2025 guide (Q1 2026: $565K revenue, $44M loss, "still lacks a firm sale"), failing all three Bloom gates. With the stock down ~75% YoY to $10.50 (-12.5% on 6/5), this is a de-rated narrative name, not a specific dated unpriced catalyst.

verified.catalyst: Refinancing of the ~$880-900M ExxonMobil Senior Secured Term Loan due June 26, 2026, alongside ongoing (not denied) U.S. government federal-credit-support discussions and the SYU production ramp.
verified.dated_milestone: ExxonMobil term loan maturity June 26, 2026 (refi targeted in Q2 2026); Consent Decree termination/modification hearing was June 1, 2026.
verified.bloom_gates: None pass cleanly. G1 fails: claimed counterparty "JPM" is unsupported — the lender of record is ExxonMobil. G2 fails: no concrete commitment exists, only "active discussions" with banks/government, no signed refi. G3 fails: the one specific dated figure (June 26 maturity) is a binary refi risk that is already heavily priced (stock cratering), not an unpriced forward edge.
verified.edge: L — the premise is mischaracterized (no "federal denial"; no JPM; the "appeal" is actually a DOJ Consent Decree motion Sable isn't party to) and the genuine event (Q2/June-26 refi) is a known overhang the market is actively re-rating, down 9.5% today and off a $32 high.
verified.primary_source: Sable Offshore Corp. "Provides Corporate Update" (Business Wire, 2026-04-20) and June 1, 2026 investor presentation 8-K (SEC EDGAR CIK 1831481, accession 000183148126000067); FMP quote 2026-06-06.
verified.analysis: SOC's only dated forward item is the ~$880-900M ExxonMobil term loan maturing June 26, 2026, to be refinanced via bank partners plus still-active (NOT denied) U.S. government credit-support talks; the flagged claim's key specifics — JPMorgan as counterparty, federal financing "denied," and a "state-vs-federal appeal ruling pending" — are not supported by Sable's own April 20 update or June 1 investor presentation (the litigation is a DOJ Consent Decree termination motion heard June 1, to which Sable is not a party). The federal restart already fired (DPA-ordered flow March 16, first sales March 30) and the refi/maturity overhang is already aggressively priced, with the stock down ~9.5% to $12.25 on 2026-06-06 from a $32 year-high. With the catalyst's premise factually off and the real binary already re-rating hard against the name rather than sitting as a mispriced forward edge, this gates to NONE.

verified.catalyst: The Codelco-SQM Atacama lithium JV (NovaAndino Litio) — the structural transformation cited — has already fully closed and is operating, so the regulatory-close thesis is no longer forward.
verified.dated_milestone: FIRED: JV materialized/first board meeting Dec 29, 2025; Q1 2026 was first full quarter operating with Codelco. Next genuine forward marker is the 2031 state-margin step-up (70%->85%), long-dated and non-specific.
verified.bloom_gates: none pass forward — G1/G2 (China SAMR conditional approval Nov 10 2025, Contraloría take-account) are already in the past; no forward G3 unpriced figure remains in an actionable window
verified.edge: L — the close, including the China final antitrust gate and Contraloría sign-off, is fully public, reported across Reuters/Mining.com/SEC 6-K, and reflected in Q1 2026 reporting; nothing unpriced left in the thesis.
verified.primary_source: SQM SEC Form 6-K "full completion" filing + Codelco press release "se materializa NovaAndino Litio" (JV effective Dec 29, 2025); China SAMR final approval Nov 10, 2025 (Mining.com/Caixin/Compass Lexecon)
verified.analysis: The triage premise that the JV is "set to close before Boric exits, pending only Chile comptroller" is stale: the deal closed Dec 29, 2025 (China SAMR being the LAST antitrust gate on Nov 10, 2025; Contraloría then took account after a clause edit), and SQM's own SEC 6-K is titled "full completion of" the partnership with Q1 2026 already "the first full quarter operating alongside Codelco." This is a fired, fully-priced structural event ~5 months pre-verification, failing the FORWARD gate; the only remaining dated element — the 2031 jump in Chilean state margin capture from ~70% to 85% — is long-dated, well-disclosed, and a fiscal-policy term, not a near-term unpriced SQM-specific catalyst. No real dated forward catalyst => NONE.

verified.catalyst: ENDEAVOR Cohort 8 sirolimus-immunosuppression readout (ALI incidence + 12-wk dystrophin in ~25 non-ambulant Duchenne patients) is the gating data for re-submitting to FDA to restore non-ambulant ELEVIDYS dosing — a recovery optionality the crisis-priced stock does not reflect.
verified.dated_milestone: Cohort 8 primary-endpoint data collection completes H2 2026 (dosing began Apr 2026); FDA submission to resume non-ambulant dosing to follow data review (date not committed).
verified.instrument: equity (deep OTM/longer-dated calls viable given distressed price ~$15.75 vs 52-wk low $10.42 and binary upside)
verified.bloom_gates: G1 (FDA as named counterparty, Cohort 8 approval 11/25/2025) + G2 (concrete committed protocol: 14-day peri-infusion sirolimus, ~25 pts, H2 2026 readout)
verified.edge: M — real dated forward binary with genuine asymmetry: stock at $15.75 near 52-wk low ($10.42), -64% from high, below 50/200d SMAs, so the non-ambulant-recovery path is unpriced; but it is a clinical/regulatory readout (binary downside risk) and the FDA submission date is soft, not a hard contractual trigger.
verified.primary_source: Sarepta/BusinessWire "Approval to Begin ENDEAVOR Cohort 8" (11/25/2025) + Q1-2026 results (5/6/2026, dosing begun Apr 2026, data H2 2026); restructuring & 2030 convert exchange per Xtalks/SEC 8-K (Jul 2025 RIF; Dec 2025 note exchange).
verified.analysis: Triage claims verified: FDA-approved ENDEAVOR Cohort 8 sirolimus study (approval 11/25/2025, dosing begun Apr 2026) with primary-endpoint data due H2 2026 as the pathway to re-establish non-ambulant ELEVIDYS dosing; restructuring (36%/~500 RIF, ~$400M cost cut) and 2027→2030 convert exchange ($291.4M swapped + $31.6M cash, Dec 2025, $158.6M residual) both confirmed. The catalyst is forward and unfired — SRPT trades deeply distressed (~$1.66B cap, near 52-wk low), so the market prices the crisis, not the recovery optionality, leaving asymmetric upside on a positive H2 2026 readout. Gap: no committed FDA-submission date ("in collaboration with FDA after reviewing data"), so timing is soft and it remains a binary clinical readout rather than a hard contractual event — WATCH not ACTIVE.

verified.catalyst: Apitegromab SMA BLA resubmitted (3/31/26) and accepted with a hard FDA PDUFA action date in late September 2026, plus a parallel EMA/MAA decision expected mid-2026.
verified.dated_milestone: FDA PDUFA action date ~Sep 30, 2026 (next: EMA/MAA decision mid-2026)
verified.instrument: equity / Sep-Oct 2026 long calls spanning the PDUFA
verified.bloom_gates: G3 (specific dated binary regulatory event — apitegromab approval/launch on a fixed PDUFA date, only partially priced because the prior CRL was manufacturing-only)
verified.edge: M — catalyst is real, company-specific and hard-dated (two regulatory binaries inside ~4 months), but a single-asset SMA PDUFA is a well-followed, partially-priced event; the prior CRL was a Catalent fill-finish issue (not efficacy/safety), which raises approval odds and compresses upside asymmetry, and the lean-mass obesity readout that would lift conviction has already fired.
verified.primary_source: Scholar Rock 8-K / press release "Resubmits BLA to FDA for Apitegromab for SMA," 3/31/26 (StockTitan + Businesswire); EMBRAZE positive readout June 2025 (BioPharma Dive); FMP quote 6/6/26 ($44.30)
verified.kill_fact:
No kill-fact: all load-bearing facts confirmed vs primary/reputable sources. Apitegromab SMA BLA resubmitted 3/31/26 (8-K, BusinessWire) and FDA-accepted with Priority Review + hard PDUFA action date of Sep 30, 2026 (Cure SMA + multiple). EMA/MAA CHMP opinion/decision anticipated mid-2026 (8-K) — two dated, forward, non-macro regulatory binaries (today 6/6-8/26, so ~3.5mo to PDUFA). Prior CRL was a Catalent Indiana manufacturing-inspection issue, not efficacy/safety, so approval is two-sided but skewed favorable — supports ACTIVE/7. Live quote confirms price $44.30, 200d ~$41.46, 52wk $27.07-$52.19 (mid-range, partial re-rate). EMBRAZE obesity readout correctly flagged as durable optionality, not a live dated catalyst. Minor nuance: 'late Sep' = Sep 30 (accurate); EMA 'mid-2026' is near-coincident with now (slightly thinner runway) but still forward.</kill_fact>
<parameter name="confidence">H
verified.analysis: Confirmed via company PR and 8-K (StockTitan, 3/31/26): apitegromab SMA BLA was resubmitted 3/31/26 and accepted with Priority Review and a late-September 2026 PDUFA, with an EMA decision anticipated mid-2026 — two clean, dated, forward, non-macro regulatory binaries. The Phase 2 EMBRAZE obesity (lean-mass) readout the triage flag cited as optionality is NOT forward: it read out positive in June 2025 (stock +15% intraday), so it is durable platform optionality, not a live dated catalyst. At $44.30 (200-day ~$41.5; 52-wk range $27–$52), the name is mid-range and only partially re-rated into the PDUFA, and because the prior rejection was a manufacturing-inspection CRL rather than efficacy/safety, the approval is genuinely two-sided but skewed favorable — supporting ACTIVE at 7 rather than higher.

verified.catalyst: SSR Mining is selling its 80% stake in the suspended Copler gold mine (Turkey) to Cengiz Holding for $1.5B all-cash under a binding definitive SPA, clearing the post-disaster overhang; only the Q3-2026 regulatory close remains forward.
verified.dated_milestone: Closing expected Q3-2026 (calendar Jul-Sep 2026), gated on approval from Turkey's General Directorate of Mining & Petroleum Affairs; next hard date is the Q2-2026 report (~early Aug 2026) for a regulatory-progress update.
verified.instrument: equity (SSRM); merger-arb deal-completion, not a fresh re-rating
verified.bloom_gates: G1 (named counterparty: Cengiz Holding A.S.), G2 (concrete commitment: $1.5B all-cash, $100M escrow deposit, $50M reciprocal break fee, no financing/permit contingency), G3 ($1.5B vs ~$5.5B mkt cap) — all met, but the disclosure already priced in.
verified.edge: L — binding deal announced Mar 3 / definitive SPA signed Mar 24, 2026; stock already re-rated off its $11.70 low and the sale was fully disclosed in Q1 results (May 5). Only a Q3 regulatory close remains, leaving a thin merger-arb residual, not forward alpha.
verified.primary_source: SSR Mining Business Wire press releases: "Announces Binding Agreement to Sell Its Ownership in the Copler Mine for $1.5 Billion in Cash" (Mar 3-4, 2026) and "Provides Update on Copler Mine Sale" / definitive SPA (Mar 24, 2026); status reconfirmed in Q1 2026 results (May 5, 2026).
verified.analysis: The catalyst is genuine, specific, dated, and binding (definitive SPA with Cengiz Holding, $1.5B cash, break fee, no financing contingency), but it has already FIRED: announced March 3-4, the equity rallied through March and the monetization was fully reflected by the May 5 Q1 report and 10-Q. SSRM is also actively redeploying the cash (Hod Maden royalty sale May 18, Phenom/Dobbin JV June 1), confirming the overhang-clearing narrative is priced. What remains forward is only deal completion in Q3-2026 pending the Turkish mining regulator — a clean but low-edge merger-arb residual that warrants WATCH (track for a closing/regulatory headline), not ACTIVE; today's -9.3% move was gold/equity, not deal-related.

verified.catalyst: SuRo Capital's board-approved externalization to Neostellar Advisors LLC (a Magnetar JV) with a committed $20M Magnetar investment goes to a binding stockholder vote, converting the internally-managed BDC to external management and rebranding to Neostellar Capital Corp.
verified.dated_milestone: Special stockholder meeting to vote on the Externalization scheduled June 10, 2026 (4 days out); transition effective July 1, 2026 if approved. Next: vote outcome 8-K ~June 10-11, 2026.
verified.instrument: common equity (SSSS); structural re-rating of price-to-NAV — common is the clean expression, no liquid/dated options edge required
verified.bloom_gates: G1 (named counterparty: Magnetar / Neostellar Advisors LLC), G2 (concrete commitment: $20M Magnetar investment, board-approved binding advisory + admin agreements), G3 (specific currently-unpriced figure: NAV $14.24/sh vs price $13.74 — externalization removing the internally-managed/closed-end discount overhang is the unpriced lever)
verified.edge: M — discrete dated binding vote with a concrete structural change and a named institutional sponsor putting $20M in; but NAV-discount is currently thin (~3.5% on stale 3/31 NAV) and the externalization adds a 1.75% base + incentive fee that partly offsets the re-rating, and outcome (vote pass + how the discount actually compresses) is uncertain.
verified.primary_source: SuRo Capital Q1 2026 results (GlobeNewsWire, 2026-05-05, NAV $14.24, Magnetar JV/Neostellar) + initial externalization announcement (GlobeNewsWire, 2026-04-07) + DEF 14A proxy confirming June 10, 2026 special-meeting vote date and July 1, 2026 effective date (StockTitan/SEC, 2026)
verified.kill_fact: Core catalyst CONFIRMED vs primary sources: board unanimously approved externalization to Neostellar Advisors LLC (Magnetar JV) on April 2, 2026; $20M Magnetar-affiliate investment INTO the Company; binding stockholder vote at June 10, 2026 special meeting; effective July 1, 2026 with rebrand to Neostellar Capital Corp (DEF 14A: 'effective on July 1, 2026'); 1.75% base fee + incentive fee with pre-existing investments EXCLUDED from incentive calc; board recommends FOR. Live price $13.74 (FMP, prev close $14.23) vs NAV $14.24 (Mar 31 2026, up 76% Q/Q from $8.09) => ~3.5% price-to-NAV discount — all CONFIRMED. CORRECTION: the LINE's '$5M already funded as of Jan 12, 2026' is a conflation error — the $5M-funded figure belongs to a SEPARATE item, SuRo's own $20M commitment to Magnetar Opportunity 2025-4 LP (TensorWave SPV, committed Dec 31 2025, $5M funded as of Mar 31 2026), NOT the conditional $20M Magnetar-into-Company investment; the 'Jan 12' date and linkage are wrong. Catalyst is genuine, idiosyncratic, dated, and remains FORWARD/UNFIRED as of 2026-06-06 (vote T+4). Score trimmed: re-rating runway is thin (discount already ~3.5%) and fee drag + vote-execution risk temper the edge.
verified.analysis: SuRo's board on April 2, 2026 unanimously approved converting from an internally-managed BDC to external management by Neostellar Advisors LLC (a JV with Magnetar), with a committed $20M Magnetar investment ($5M already funded as of Jan 12, 2026), a binding stockholder vote at a June 10, 2026 special meeting, and a July 1, 2026 effective date / Neostellar Capital Corp rebrand — a real, dated, idiosyncratic structural catalyst, not a macro bet. The thesis is a re-rating of the ~3.5% price-to-NAV discount ($13.74 vs $14.24, with NAV up 76% Q/Q on AI-portfolio marks) as the closed-end/internal-management overhang is removed and an institutional sponsor anchors the structure. Main risks: the 1.75% base + incentive fee dilutes some of the re-rating value, the live discount is already narrow, and the vote (though board-recommended) is not yet consummated — so it remains forward and unfired as of the 2026-06-06 as-of date.

verified.catalyst: The single regulatory gate the thesis named (UK CMA editorial remedy) already resolved — CMA published its final report conditionally clearing Getty/Shutterstock on 15-May-2026 — so the dated forward catalyst no longer exists.
verified.dated_milestone: CMA final report published 15-May-2026 (gate FIRED); CMA derogation 04-Jun-2026; only non-specific remaining item is editorial divestiture + deal close, guided vaguely to 2H-2026 with no firm date.
verified.instrument: equity (all-stock MoE; SSTK payoff tracks Getty equity, not a fixed cash spread)
verified.bloom_gates: None — G1/G2/G3 all fail. The named counterparty gate (CMA) is no longer forward; no concrete dated commitment remains; no specific currently-unpriced figure (stock-for-stock, no cash spread to capture).
verified.edge: L — the thesis hung on the ~Apr-19 CMA decision, which the market has already absorbed (final clearance 15-May); SSTK sits at its 52-wk low ($12.96 vs $29.50 high, below 50/200-day), so the event is re-rated/priced, not an unpriced forward arb.
verified.primary_source: UK CMA "Getty Images / Shutterstock merger inquiry" case page (gov.uk): final report published 15-May-2026, derogation 04-Jun-2026; DOJ unconditional clearance press release 23-Feb-2026; FMP SSTK quote $12.96 as of 06-Jun-2026.
verified.analysis: The triage's central claim — a tight dated arb on a single remaining gate with a ~Apr-19-2026 decision — is stale: the CMA published its FINAL Phase 2 report on 15-May-2026 conditionally clearing the merger (editorial divestiture of Rex Features/Backgrid/Splash), with a derogation on 04-Jun-2026, so the catalyst has already fired rather than being forward. What remains (finding divestiture buyers and closing, loosely "2H-2026") is undated and non-specific, and because the deal is an all-stock merger of equals, SSTK's value tracks Getty's depressed equity rather than a fixed spread — SSTK trades at its 52-week low ($12.96) far below 50/200-day averages, confirming the move is priced, not an unpriced edge. Fails FORWARD and the dated-arb premise; gate to NONE.

verified.catalyst: Hard merger-arb: Prosperity Bancshares (PB) acquires Stellar Bancorp for $11.36 cash + 0.3803 PB shares per share; all regulatory approvals received and shareholder vote passed, leaving only the deal close.
verified.dated_milestone: Expected merger close on or about July 1, 2026 (next/final milestone; all prior conditions cleared)
verified.instrument: Long STEL common, short 0.3803 PB per share to capture the cash+stock spread to close (cash-and-stock hard arb).
verified.bloom_gates: G1 (named counterparty Prosperity Bancshares) + G2 (concrete fixed consideration $11.36 + 0.3803 PB, all approvals + vote secured)
verified.edge: L — last hard gate (shareholder vote May 27) already cleared, so spread is largely re-rated; live gross spread is only ~$0.15/share (~0.40%, ~5.8% annualized) with residual exposure to PB stock leg and borrow cost.
verified.primary_source: SEC Form 8-K (Stellar Bancorp), shareholder vote results filed May 27-28, 2026 (accession 000119312526242039); regulatory-approval 8-K Apr 22, 2026; live FMP quotes STEL $37.59 / PB $69.36 (June 6, 2026)
verified.kill_fact: All load-bearing facts independently confirmed vs primary/reputable sources: PB/STEL definitive merger ($11.36 cash + 0.3803 PB shares/STEL, announced Jan 27 2026) per SEC S-4/424B3; FDIC + Texas Dept of Banking approved bank merger and Fed Reserve Bank of Dallas granted prior-approval waiver (Businesswire Apr 22 2026); STEL shareholders approved May 27 2026 (~77.3% of shares, 39.2M for); close expected on/about July 1 2026 — so catalyst is FORWARD, not fired (today 2026-06-06). Live: STEL $37.59, PB $69.36 -> deal value 11.36 + 0.3803*69.36 = $37.74, gross spread ~$0.15 (~0.40%) over ~25d (~5.8% annualized gross before borrow), requiring a 0.3803 PB short to lock. Legit dated forward hard-arb but de-risking events are behind it; only a thin, nearly-fully-priced spread remains, so edge is LOW. Score reduced from 6 to 4 to reflect minimal residual edge.
verified.analysis: Real, dated, forward hard merger-arb: PB/STEL definitive deal (Jan 27, 2026) has ALL regulatory approvals (FDIC, Texas Dept of Banking, Fed Dallas waiver, Apr 22, 2026) and STEL shareholders approved on May 27, 2026; only the ~July 1 close remains, so the catalyst has not yet fired. Spread is, however, nearly fully priced: at PB $69.36 the deal is worth ~$37.74 vs STEL $37.59, a ~$0.15 (~0.40%) gross spread over ~25 days, and the stock leg requires a PB short to lock. Qualifies as ACTIVE (forward, dated, non-macro) but with LOW edge since the de-risking events are behind it and only thin spread remains.

verified.catalyst: Pivotal Ph3 EMPEROR (zorevunersen/Dravet syndrome, partnered with Biogen, BTD + rare-pediatric designation) reads out mid-2027 with a rolling NDA in H1'27 — a binary de-risking event, but the near-term print is only the Q2'26 enrollment-completion milestone.
verified.dated_milestone: Enrollment of ~150 patients completes Q2'26 (next, ~weeks out); value-inflection Ph3 topline readout mid-2027; rolling NDA initiation H1'27.
verified.instrument: equity (long-dated calls for the mid-2027 binary; near-term Q2 enrollment print is low-impact)
verified.bloom_gates: G1 (named counterparty Biogen) + G2 (concrete commitment: Ph3 EMPEROR NCT06872125, rolling NDA H1'27)
verified.edge: M — BTD/disease-modification asymmetry is real and Biogen-validated, but the value-inflection readout is ~12 months out and the only near-term dated event (Q2'26 enrollment completion) is operational, not de-risking; the upside Ph1/2-data + Biogen-deal re-rate already fired (yr range $10.6→$40.2, now $30 near 200d avg) and the Jan-2026 timeline slip already re-rated it down.
verified.primary_source: Stoke Therapeutics 8-K / BusinessWire, "Updates to Timelines for...EMPEROR Study of Zorevunersen," Jan 11, 2026; Q1 10-Q cash/runway as of Mar 31, 2026.
verified.analysis: Verified: enrollment completion was pushed to Q2'26 and the value-inflection Ph3 topline readout to mid-2027 (with rolling NDA H1'27) in a Jan 11, 2026 BusinessWire release; $411M cash funds operations into 2028, fully covering the trial. The catalyst is real, specific, dated, forward and not a macro bet, and the binary readout has NOT fired — but the de-risking event is ~12 months out and the only imminent dated milestone (Q2 enrollment completion) is a low-impact logistics print, so it clears WATCH but not ACTIVE. Gap: I did not independently confirm the precise day-of-event stock reaction to the Jan timeline slip, but year-range positioning (now $30 vs $40 high / $10.6 low, ~200d avg) indicates the prior data/deal upside is already substantially priced.

verified.catalyst: Sun Communities' ~$1.03B all-cash sale of UK Park Holidays to Aermont (announced May 21, 2026) is expected to close 2H-2026 pending FCA approval, but proceeds deployment (special div / buyback) is explicitly left to board "broad discretion" with no committed amount or date.
verified.dated_milestone: UK Park Holidays sale close expected 2H-2026, gated on UK FCA regulatory approval (next hard date: deal completion in H2-2026; no special-dividend declaration date exists)
verified.bloom_gates: G1 only (named counterparty Aermont/Panther Bidco on the divestiture); G2 FAILS (proceeds use uncommitted — "broad discretion," no special-div size/date); G3 FAILS (deal price public since May 21 and impairment is a known headwind, not unpriced upside)
verified.edge: L — the actual dated/forward event is a routine ~$1B divestiture (small vs ~$18-19B cap) being done at a $1.0-1.1B loss to carrying value (impairment booked Q2/Q3-2026), already public and priced; the capital-return upside the lane assumes is pattern-based speculation on an undeclared future board action.
verified.primary_source: SUI Form 8-K dated 2026-06-01 (SEC accession 000091259326000194) confirming $1.0-1.1B non-cash impairment + board "broad discretion" over proceeds; and StockTitan/press release of the May 21, 2026 Aermont sale announcement
verified.analysis: The deal is real, named, and dated (Aermont, £768M/$1.03B, announced 2026-05-21, FCA-conditioned 2H-2026 close), but the flag's capital_return thesis is not backed by any concrete commitment — the June 1, 2026 8-K explicitly grants the board "broad discretion" over proceeds and the Q2 distribution ($1.12, pay Jul 15) is ordinary, not special. A $1.0-1.1B non-cash impairment (consideration below NAV, booked Q2/Q3-2026) signals the disposal is at a loss to book, undercutting any value-unlock angle, and the divestiture price has been public for ~2.5 weeks so it is not unpriced. Net: G1 passes on the M&A leg but the flagged capital-return catalyst (special div) is undeclared/speculative and the divestiture itself is too small and already-priced to be ACTIVE — keep as low WATCH for a possible special-dividend declaration around/after the 2H-2026 close.

verified.catalyst: Suzano's $3.4B acquisition of 51% of Kimberly-Clark's international tissue JV (Netherlands) is fully antitrust-cleared and set to close Q3-2026, gated only on K-C's internal corporate reorganization.
verified.dated_milestone: Q3-2026 closing (next date: Q3-2026; antitrust fully cleared — EU unconditional ~May-10, UK CMA cleared May-28-2026)
verified.instrument: Own the underlying (SUZ ADR); thin/low-variance arb spread, not an options setup
verified.bloom_gates: G1 (named counterparty Kimberly-Clark) + G2 (concrete commitment: 51% buy, $3.4B EV, Q3-2026 close). G3 FAILS — the 49% call-option "structural hardening" has no dated terms or unpriced figure in the 6-K.
verified.edge: L — the key de-risking catalyst (antitrust) has already FIRED and is widely reported (EU + UK cleared May-2026); remaining Q3-2026 close is largely mechanical on K-C's reorg, low-variance, and the "own the underlying" thesis is really a pulp-cycle/valuation bet (SUZ $8.18 near 52wk low vs $13.40 PT), i.e. a cyclical/macro lean rather than a clean forward arb edge.
verified.primary_source: Suzano 6-K via StockTitan ("all approvals obtained... closing expected Q3-2026, subject to K-C corporate reorganization"); Reuters "UK watchdog clears Suzano, Kimberly-Clark $3.4B JV" (2026-05-28); Reuters EU-nod exclusive (2026-05-05)
verified.analysis: The merger is real, specific, and dated: all competition approvals are obtained (6-K confirms; EU unconditional ~May-10, UK CMA cleared May-28-2026) and Suzano reiterates a Q3-2026 close gated solely on Kimberly-Clark's multi-region corporate reorganization. But the highest-conviction catalyst — antitrust clearance — has already fired and been broadly reported, leaving only a low-variance completion event; G3 fails because the touted 49% call option has no dated/quantified terms in the filing. With SUZ trading near its 52-week low on pulp-price volatility (not the deal), "own the underlying" is effectively a cyclical valuation bet rather than a forward merger-arb edge, so this is a WATCH, not ACTIVE.

verified.catalyst: FDA PDUFA decision on Savara's first-in-class orphan inhaled biologic MOLBREEVI (molgramostim) BLA for autoimmune pulmonary alveolar proteinosis (aPAP), with a clean review record (no safety/efficacy/CMC concerns flagged).
verified.dated_milestone: PDUFA action date Nov-22-2026 (extended from Aug-22-2026 for additional-information request only).
verified.instrument: SVRA common (NASDAQ); ~$5.09, mkt cap ~$1.0B, 52wk range $1.98-$7.00 — long calls / Nov-or-later expiry straddle the event.
verified.bloom_gates: G3 — specific currently-unpriced figure: a binary first-in-class orphan approval (~5.5 months out) carrying a clean FDA review record (no safety/efficacy/CMC concerns), where the extension was purely an information request, not a deficiency; market sits mid-range, not pricing approval.
verified.edge: M-H — real, specific, dated, asymmetric binary on a clean review; de-risked vs typical PDUFA. Capped at M-H because the event and the Aug->Nov extension were both press-released and widely covered (no informational asymmetry); edge is in the clean-record/asymmetry framing, not obscurity.
verified.primary_source: OINDPnews, "FDA extends review of Savara's BLA for Molbreevi... for aPAP," Apr-2026 (new PDUFA Nov-22-2026, no safety/efficacy/CMC concerns); FMP quote $5.09, 2026-06-06.
verified.kill_fact: No kill-fact. All load-bearing facts verified vs primary sources: SVRA=Savara $5.09, mkt cap ~$1.04B, NASDAQ, 52wk $1.98-$7.00 (FMP live). MOLBREEVI (molgramostim) BLA for aPAP under Priority Review; PDUFA Nov-22-2026, extended from Aug-22 because FDA requested additional info, with company stating FDA 'has not expressed any concerns about safety, efficacy, or manufacturing' (OINDPnews, Apr 2026; Savara IR). Day-74 letter confirmed NO AdCom planned (added de-risking). Catalyst is forward (~5.5mo out from 2026-06-06), dated, specific, drug-level binary — not fired, not macro. Minor nuance: 'no concerns' is the company's characterization of FDA comms, not a direct FDA statement — accurate but worth attributing. Held at 6: asymmetry is genuine but well-publicized, single-product name near $1B carries real binary/priced-in risk; calls/Nov+ expiry straddle the event so tradeable.
verified.analysis: Verified: SVRA = Savara Inc., $5.09, ~$1.0B cap (sub-$6 share price confirmed; closer to small- than micro-cap by mkt cap). MOLBREEVI BLA for aPAP holds Priority Review + Breakthrough/Fast Track/orphan; PDUFA is Nov-22-2026, extended from Aug-22 solely because FDA requested additional info, with the agency expressing no safety, efficacy, or manufacturing concerns (OINDPnews, Apr 2026) — a materially de-risking signal for a first-in-class drug. Catalyst is dated, forward (not fired, ~5.5mo out), specific, and not a macro bet, so the ACTIVE/score-6 triage holds; held at 6 because the asymmetry is well-publicized rather than proprietary.

verified.analysis: The catalyst is real, specific, and dated, but the triage attached it to the WRONG ticker: CDE is Coeur Mining (silver/gold miner); the actual UHS/$5.25 takeout target is Talkspace (TALK). The deal facts verify (announced Mar 9 2026, shareholders approved May 29 2026 at ~73.5%, Q3-26 close pending state regulatory approvals), but TALK trades $5.22 vs the $5.25 cash price — a ~0.6% gross residual spread, so the move has already fired/re-rated (stock up from ~$2.22 52w low). Real dated merger-arb but no meaningful unpriced forward edge remains, hence WATCH not ACTIVE.

Single-asset binary microcap.
verified.primary_source: Tamboran IR press release "Reaches Final Investment Decision on Shenandoah South Pilot Project" (2 Oct 2025); Q3-FY2026 earnings call via MarketBeat (15 May 2026); FMP quote $35.57 as of 6 Jun 2026.
verified.analysis: The dated forward milestone is real and specific: first commissioned gas sales in Q3-2026 under a binding 40 TJ/day GSA with the NT Government, with the Sturt Plateau Compression Facility 88% complete and on budget as of end-April 2026. However the headline value events (Oct-2025 FID, signed GSA, Falcon acquisition) are already fired and the equity is heavily re-rated (~2x off lows, near 50-day average), and the April-2026 capital raise removes the triage's funding-risk concern — so what remains is execution/commissioning, an incremental rather than sharply unpriced catalyst. Legitimate WATCH on schedule-slip or first-gas confirmation, not an ACTIVE entry; single-asset binary microcap with most of the easy re-rating behind it.
